title: Australian Christmas Pudding Fritters
description: A sweet and indulgent dessert perfect for Christmas, these fritters are made with shredded Christmas pudding and served hot with a drizzle of maple syrup.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the shredded Christmas pudding, flour, breadcrumbs, eggs, sugar, and vanilla essence. Mix well to combine.
Heat a non-stick frying pan with about 1-2 cm of vegetable oil over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the mixture into the hot oil, flattening slightly with a spatula.
Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters hot with a drizzle of maple syrup.
